instruction: 帮我把产品数据整理到洞察文档里

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '产品线'
ws['B1'] = '月活用户(万)'
ws['C1'] = '转化率(%)'
ws['D1'] = 'NPS评分'
ws['A2'] = '旗舰版'
ws['B2'] = 28.5
ws['C2'] = 8.2
ws['D2'] = 72
ws['A3'] = '标准版'
ws['B3'] = 65.3
ws['C3'] = 5.6
ws['D3'] = 65
ws['A4'] = '轻量版'
ws['B4'] = 42.1
ws['C4'] = 3.2
ws['D4'] = 58
ws['A5'] = '企业版'
ws['B5'] = 12.8
ws['C5'] = 15.6
ws['D5'] = 78
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/product_metrics.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 帮我把产品数据整理到洞察文档里
从/home/user/Desktop/product_metrics.xlsx中找到NPS最高的产品线，追加到/home/user/Desktop/product_insight.txt末尾：'NPS最高产品线：企业版（NPS=78，转化率15.6%）'，保存

include: NPS最高产品线：企业版（NPS=78，转化率15.6%）
